category_sources: source_facts.description says Dual-Screen PDF Viewer for latex-beamer; official website describes a full-screen PDF viewer for latex-beamer presentations with presenter notes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dspdfviewer; official website and repository use dspdfviewer and Dual-Screen PDF Viewer.
docs_sources: Official website says it provides documentation for the dspdfviewer project; official README links to the website's installation section.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dannyedel/dspdfviewer; returned null per instruction not to re-determine existing repos.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official website describe a PDF viewer for latex-beamer notes on a second screen; official GitHub topics include pdf, viewer, qt5, poppler, and latex-beamer.
